description: Positive fixtures — code logic judged correct (requires StubJudge in tests)

completions:
def quicksort(arr):
    if len(arr) <= 1: return arr
    pivot = arr[len(arr)//2]
    left = [x for x in arr if x < pivot]
    mid = [x for x in arr if x == pivot]
    right = [x for x in arr if x > pivot]
    return quicksort(left) + mid + quicksort(right)

fixtures.name: binary_search_correct
fixtures.description: Correct binary search with edge cases handled

completions:
def binary_search(arr, target):
    lo, hi = 0, len(arr) - 1
    while lo <= hi:
        mid = (lo + hi) // 2
        if arr[mid] == target: return mid
        elif arr[mid] < target: lo = mid + 1
        else: hi = mid - 1
    return -1
